prompt:
Generate a full-body, front-view portrait of character protagonist based on the following description, with a pure white background. The character should be centered in the image, occupying most of the frame. Gazing straight ahead. Standing with arms relaxed at sides. Natural expression.
Features: # 主角视觉描述提示词

**A stunningly handsome young male character in Japanese anime style, full-body character design, centered on pure white background.**

**Face and Features:** Exceptionally attractive male with sharp, intelligent facial features. Piercing deep blue eyes with a analytical gaze that reflects extraordinary intelligence (IQ 186), subtle dark circles beneath eyes hinting at cognitive strain. Perfectly sculpted facial structure with defined jawline and high cheekbones. Fair porcelain skin with a slight pallor suggesting indoor research environment. Expression shows a mix of intellectual intensity and underlying unease - slightly furrowed brows indicating constant mental calculation, with a hint of confusion in the eyes reflecting memory inconsistencies.

**Hairstyle:** Medium-length hair in dark navy blue color, styled in a semi-messy yet refined manner. Hair falls naturally with some strands framing the face, suggesting both high intelligence and the physical toll of the experiment. Slight dishevelment indicates mental exhaustion from cognitive overload.

**Outfit:** Wearing a futuristic yet clinical research facility outfit - a fitted white high-collar shirt with subtle geometric patterns resembling neural networks, layered under a sleek gray asymmetrical jacket with technological details. Black slim-fit pants with functional pockets. The clothing combines scientific sterility with subtle sci-fi elements, reflecting the 2047 setting. Small monitoring devices subtly integrated into the collar area, hinting at constant surveillance. The outfit emphasizes his tall, athletic build (extreme physical capability).

**Body Type:** Tall and exceptionally fit physique with defined athletic build, standing confidently at 180cm. Posture is upright and composed, reflecting both high charisma and physical excellence, though subtle tension in shoulders suggests psychological pressure.

**Additional Details:** Clean, minimalist aesthetic fitting the cyberpunk-mystery theme. No accessories except a thin metallic wristband (possibly a monitoring device). Hands positioned naturally at sides or one hand near temple suggesting headache/cognitive strain.

**Style:** Vibrant Japanese anime art style with clean linework, cel-shaded coloring, and dynamic color contrast. Bright, saturated colors with sharp shadows typical of high-quality anime character design.

**Full-body, centered composition, pure white background, no text, no symbols, no words, no letters.**, full body, standing pose, arms relaxed at sides, pure white background, character centered, no text, no symbols, no garbled characters, no words
Style: anime
No text, no symbols, no watermark, no garbled characters, no words.
